scripts.build:admin: npm --prefix apps/admin-panel install --legacy-peer-deps && npm --prefix apps/admin-panel run build
scripts.build:owner: npm --prefix apps/owner-app install --legacy-peer-deps && npm --prefix apps/owner-app run build
scripts.test:rules: npm run normalize:rules && npm run verify:rules-hardening && firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project bin-group-57c60 "node --test test/security-rules.test.js"
scripts.test:rules:node: npm run normalize:rules && npm run verify:rules-hardening && node --test test/security-rules.test.js
scripts.test:stability: npm run normalize:rules && npm run verify:rules-hardening && node scripts/production-stability-guard.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:public: playwright install --with-deps chromium && E2E_BASE_URL=${E2E_BASE_URL:-https://bin-group-57c60.web.app} playwright test --grep "production public smoke" --project=chromium-desktop
scripts.test:e2e:local: npm run build && playwright install --with-deps chromium && playwright test --grep "production public smoke" --project=chromium-desktop
scripts.test:e2e:launch-audit: npm run test:e2e:env && playwright install --with-deps chromium && playwright test tests/e2e/launch-audit-*.spec.ts tests/e2e/hard-launch-routes.spec.ts --project=chromium-desktop
scripts.test:e2e:business: playwright install --with-deps chromium && playwright test tests/e2e/business-owner.spec.ts tests/e2e/business-tenant.spec.ts tests/e2e/business-technician.spec.ts tests/e2e/business-admin.spec.ts tests/e2e/business-broker.spec.ts tests/e2e/business-global.spec.ts --project=chromium-desktop
